title: nepeta densiflora
intro: Nepeta densiflora, also known as Spanish catmint, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its compact growth habit and blue-purple flowers. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as relieving symptoms of anxiety and insomnia, reducing pain and inflammation, and supporting digestive health. Nepeta densiflora can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
